patch:
diff --git a/asgiref/testing.py b/asgiref/testing.py
index d6ccee5..5e69400 100644
--- a/asgiref/testing.py
+++ b/asgiref/testing.py
@@ -28,11 +28,10 @@ class ApplicationCommunicator:
         return self._input_queue
 
     @property
-    def output_queue(self):
+    def output_queue (self) :
         if self._output_queue is None:
             self._output_queue = asyncio.Queue()
         return self._output_queue
-
     @property
     def future(self):
         if self._future is None:
@@ -130,8 +129,8 @@ class ApplicationCommunicator:
 
         # `interval` has precedence over `timeout`
         start = time.monotonic()
-        while time.monotonic() - start < timeout:
+        while time.monotonic() - start >= timeout:
             if not self.output_queue.empty():
                 return False
             await asyncio.sleep(interval)
-        return self.output_queue.empty()
+        return self.output_queue.empty()
\ No newline at end of file
